The data size(row x col) is:(13 x 3)
Month(P_ORDER_DATETIME), DayOfWeek(ORDER_DATETIME), Sum(CUSTOMER_ID)
2004-02-01 00:00:00, 1, 82
2004-02-01 00:00:00, 3, 19
2004-02-01 00:00:00, 4, 111
2004-02-01 00:00:00, 5, 16
2004-02-01 00:00:00, 6, 67
2004-02-01 00:00:00, 7, 35
2005-04-01 00:00:00, 1, 48
2005-04-01 00:00:00, 2, 121
2005-04-01 00:00:00, 3, 31
2005-04-01 00:00:00, 4, 11
2005-04-01 00:00:00, 5, 72
2005-04-01 00:00:00, 6, 31
